title: Remote Transfer v2 stress operator slices
objective: Operate Remote Transfer v2 stress work as ordered, evidence-producing slices without accidentally dispatching the 1000-slice topology to live providers.
negative_constraints: MUST NOT run the 1000-slice topology with live providers
MUST NOT commit failed provider-limit evidence as successful live evidence
MUST NOT bypass FACTORY_V3_MAX_LIVE_TASKS without explicit provider-limit evidence
MUST NOT transfer provider OAuth credentials or CLI session files
MUST NOT continue live escalation after provider-limit, auth, network, or closure blockers

evidence: summarizer JSON includes counts and first_failed samples
stop_rules: Stop if the AO home is missing; do not fabricate diagnostics.

stop_rules: Stop if contract and topology disagree.

stop_rules: Stop if the command is changed from --dry-run to --run.

stop_rules: Stop if AO dispatch starts.
